citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
Housekeeping at the facility needs to be addressed. There are several runs that have no dogs but do have feces
remaining in the enclosures on wire mesh. Additionally the facility is hosing down underneath the runs weekly but then is
not fully removing shavings and feces that are left sitting in drains. As these empty runs are not cleaned and feces and
shavings not fully removed from underneath the runs, it is contributing to a strong smell around the outside of the kennel.
These areas need to be cleaned to facilitate good housekeeping practices and for the health of the animals.
Correct by: April 16, 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
3.11(c) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
Housekeeping at the facility needs to be addressed. There are several runs that have no dogs but do have feces 
remaining in the enclosures on wire mesh. Additionally the facility is hosing down underneath the runs weekly but then is 
not fully removing shavings and feces that are left sitting in drains. As these empty runs are not cleaned and feces and 
shavings not fully removed from underneath the runs, it is contributing to a strong smell around the outside of the kennel. 
These areas need to be cleaned to facilitate good housekeeping practices and for the health of the animals.  
 
Correct by: April 16, 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
